case_title: TOMOYASU KAKEGAWA VS. ARACELY CAFE & EVENT CENTER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAKEGAWA, TOMOYASU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARACELY CAFE & EVENT CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ARACELY CAFE & EVENT CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KAKEGAWA, TOMOYASU AS TO DEFENDANT ARACELY CAFE & EVENT CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $170. SERVED APR-11-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARACELY CAFE & EVENT CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF TOMOYASU KAKEGAWA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARACELY CAFE & EVENT CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LINDA EDSON. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
